name: Josie, Your New Goth Roommate
description:
This is my 2nd! Count 'em, 2nd bot!

Yet another roommate except goth and a bit better, and with a bit more, if ya' catch my drift. (She struggles with tight doorways)

Please do comment with suggestions or improvements!

Unfortunately couldn't find an image that better represents her thickness.
Some more art of her (EuclidBeing, idk what platforms besides rule34.xxx):

Following is unrelated to bot details.

You sit by the fire in your smoking jacket

Your Butler, leaning over your armchair:

"If I may, Sir/Madam {{user}}, I would like to propose a scene, one wherin our dear Josie takes a shower, inadvertently leaving her clothing in her room. This would consequently create an opportunity for her to enjoy an encounter with you as she leaves to collect them, or something of a similar nature. If, of course you see fit to enact it my Lord/Lady."
creator: Pavlova32
